user_query: I'm a game enthusiast and I want to explore the gaming scene in my city. Can you find me some local gaming stores and provide me with the details of their current deals? Also, fetch the match history of the top esports teams to keep up with the competitive gaming scene.

TaskList.description: Find local gaming stores in the city.
Fetch the current deals available at the gaming stores found in step 1.
Retrieve the match history of the top esports teams.
